/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_surfaces.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_surfaces.dir/test_surfaces.cpp.o -o test_surfaces  ../libopen2open.a -Wl,--start-group ../opennurbs/libopennurbsStatic.a ../opennurbs/zlib/libzlib.a ../opennurbs/freetype263/libopennurbs_public_freetype.a ../opennurbs/android_uuid/libandroid_uuid.a -Wl,--end-group /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKHLR.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKOffset.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKFillet.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKFeat.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKBool.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKBO.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKPrim.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKXMesh.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKMesh.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKShHealing.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKTopAlgo.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKGeomAlgo.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKBRep.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKGeomBase.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKG3d.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKG2d.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKMath.a /home/runner/work/open2open/open2open/build_artifacts/occt/lib/libTKernel.a -lpthread -lrt -lstdc++ -ldl
